name: helgesverre/markdown
description: A dirty-tricks Markdown parser (PHP FFI -> md4c).

profile:flamegraph: MARKDOWN_FFI_LIB="$PWD/native/libmd4cshim.prof.dylib" samply record -- php -d opcache.preload= -d ffi.enable=1 bench/profile_target.php commonmark-spec.md 5000 html

scripts-descriptions.build: Compile the native md4c FFI shim for this platform (.dylib/.so/.dll)
scripts-descriptions.build:all: Cross-compile shipped libraries for all platforms into lib/ (needs zig)
scripts-descriptions.profile:build: Build the symbol-rich profiling lib (libmd4cshim.prof.*) for native profilers — see docs/profiling.md
scripts-descriptions.format: Format all PHP code with Mago (same formatter Tempest uses)
scripts-descriptions.format:check: Verify formatting without writing changes (CI gate)
scripts-descriptions.lint: Report code-style/lint issues with Mago (non-failing warnings)
scripts-descriptions.lint:fix: Auto-fix safe lint issues, then reformat
scripts-descriptions.style: Format + auto-fix everything in one go (format then lint:fix)
scripts-descriptions.check: Run the CI correctness gate (render parity + GFM + speed sanity)
scripts-descriptions.bench: Run the default PHPBench suite (HTML throughput up to ~256KB + front matter) and write results/RESULTS.md
scripts-descriptions.bench:stress: Run the throughput bench against the 1MB/8MB scaling tiers (run `composer corpus` first to generate them)
scripts-descriptions.profile: Profile the native hot path with macOS `sample` and write results/PROFILE.md (auto-builds the profiling lib). Args: [corpus] [mode] [seconds]
scripts-descriptions.profile:flamegraph: Profile with samply and open an interactive flamegraph in the browser (macOS/samply)
scripts-descriptions.corpus: Regenerate the large synthetic corpus tiers (doc-1mb/doc-8mb, not committed)
scripts-descriptions.examples: Run every examples/*.php acid-test script in order
